title: Eva Character Ringtones
wikitext:
[]: Eva Character Ringtones!             Quote Post by Kiel » Mon Jul 26, 2004 10:23 pm Now I'm sure you forum readers clicked this post in hopes of either finding of posting snazzy "Cruel Angel's Thesis" or "Rei II" ringtones... ...but you'd be wrong! DEAD WRONG!!!! :mrgreen: This post is simply one of silly ideas and poking some fun Assuming most of the Eva character had cellphones, what ringtones do you think they'd have? Don't skimp on the crazyness here folks. Oh, and If you wanna post your cool Eva ringtones, be my guest! You'll be doing your Eva fan community proud 8) !

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Jul 26, 2004 10:33 pm Asuka would have the Trog Dor song.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jul 26, 2004 10:36 pm ARe you kidding? Flight of the Valkyries. Shinjis would be something along the lines of Suiten Fur Violenchello or somthing like that.

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Mon Jul 26, 2004 10:45 pm Kaworu would definitely have an Ode to Joy ringtone.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Mon Jul 26, 2004 11:05 pm Asuka would so have the Trogdor theme song!!! Here are my pics, tho: (as out of character as they may be...) Gendo: Theme from Ghostbusters Aoba: Purple Haze (Hendrix) Misato: hmmm...Theme from The A-Team, maybe Rei: Funky Town Ritsuko: the Tetris song! (I could see Ritsuko playing Tetris when nobody's looking ) Kaworu: ode to joy...or anything by the village people! Shinji: because, deep down, everybody wants to be a fighter... Theme from Rocky! enjoy

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 27, 2004 12:13 am Shinji would have some cheesy J-Pop ringtone.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jul 27, 2004 12:31 am Maybe Shinji would have bohemian rhapsody ringtone.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Jul 27, 2004 5:14 am really sad and depressing music for Shinji or what he listens to on his SDAT for Asuka, heavy metal? something that sounds violent... Misato would have something like j-pop and Rei would have a flat tone...BEEEEEEE BEEEEEEE same with gendo...

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jul 27, 2004 5:54 am sadsadshinji wrote: for Asuka, heavy metal? something that sounds violent...

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Jul 27, 2004 7:07 am or maybe metallica?

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jul 27, 2004 7:24 am the_seventh_child wrote: Maybe Shinji would have bohemian rhapsody ringtone.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jul 27, 2004 7:29 am cain luppus wrote: the_seventh_child wrote: Maybe Shinji would have bohemian rhapsody ringtone.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jul 27, 2004 11:14 am Queen is teh awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jul 27, 2004 11:58 am cain luppus wrote: Queen is teh awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Tue Jul 27, 2004 1:25 pm Very agree that Queen rocks!!! I think Asuka would be either a Ramstein or Gacht fan. Kaji would have "secret agent man" for his ringtone!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jul 27, 2004 2:08 pm Kiel wrote: Very agree that Queen rocks!!! I think Asuka would be either a Ramstein or Gacht fan.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Fri Jan 14, 2005 7:04 pm the_seventh_child wrote: Kiel wrote: Very agree that Queen rocks!!! I think Asuka would be either a Ramstein or Gacht fan.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Sat Jan 15, 2005 2:12 pm Kiel wrote: Rei: Funky Town

[]:             Quote Post by Miuzaki » Fri Nov 19, 2010 1:21 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Shinji would have some cheesy J-Pop ringtone.

[]:             Quote Post by Born of Lilith » Fri Nov 19, 2010 4:17 am Somehow I could really imagine Shinji having this as his ringtone. Engel by Rammstein for Asuka. Rei would probably have Fly Me to the Moon, hehe.
